subcodes.first_line: How many a servant hath occupied himself with the world, heedless of its passing, and how many a servant hath forsaken it, turning unto his Ancient Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم من عبد اشتغل بالدنیا غافلا عن فنائها و کم من عبد ترکها مقبلا الی مولاه القدیم
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
